derivation.scope: Human-readable normalized rule facts needed before deriving mechanics-ready and UI-ready JSON.

normalizationPrinciples: Record rule-facing facts, not TypeScript effect class names.
Every active spell needs availability, cost, targeting, duration, core effect, scaling, and required player inputs when used.
Passive and contextual entries are included when current mechanics need them, but they are marked separately from normal active cast-form spells.
If a field is not used by current mechanics or combat UI, it is omitted.

entries.name: Alerted Self
rules: Alertness skill bonus equals Awareness level.

entries.name: Awakened Insight
rules: Grants +1 temporary inspiration per session.
Temporary inspiration does not stack.
The source's uninspired-status interaction is not modeled because the current sheet/runtime has no uninspired status mechanic.

entries.name: Techno-Invisibility Immunity
rules: Adds a utility trait for techno-invisibility immunity.

entries.name: Assess Entity
entries.targeting: single character in line of sight
rules: Allowed CR equals min(caster PER + Awareness level, CR cap by level).
CR cap by level is 6, 9, 12, 15, 18.
Target above allowed CR blocks the spell.
Successful use writes encounter output and linked knowledge/history data.

entries.name: Brute Defiance
rules: Triggers when current HP is between 0 and -5.
Queues delayed stand-up through body_reinforcement_revive.
Usable once per day.
Revive HP by level is 1, 2, 4, 8, 16.

entries.name: Boost Physique
entries.targeting: self at level 1; one friendly target at level 2+
rules: Chosen stat must be STR, DEX, or STAM.
Stat bonus by level is +1, +1, +2, +2, +3.
Damage reduction bonus is +1 at level 4 and +2 at level 5.

entries.name: Crowd Management
rules: Social skill bonus equals Crowd Control level.

entries.name: Compulsion Guard
rules: Adds Social skill while defending against control effects.

entries.name: Control Entity
entries.cost: standard action; 0 mana cast; ongoing upkeep mana
entries.targeting: enemy control target count by level 1, 1, 2, 2, 3
rules: Caster contest pool is CHA + INT at levels 1-3.
Caster contest pool is CHA + INT + Crowd Control level at levels 4-5.
Target contest pool is WITS + CHA.
Tie fails.
Pre-level 5 targets must be living.
Level 5 allows valid non-living targets where supported.
Controlled target gains paralyzed and controlled status.
Control can break on damage and grants temporary crowd control immunity.

entries.name: Release Control
rules: Removes controlled/paralyzed state and releases maintained control.

entries.name: Elemental Bolt
entries.cost: standard action; 1 mana elemental; 2 mana necrotic at level 5
rules: Elemental damage is INT + Elementalist level.
Level 1 chooses one elemental type and keeps it.
Level 2 locks chosen element until long rest.
Level 3+ can choose elemental type freely.
Level 5 unlocks necrotic.
Necrotic damages living targets with vulnerability rules and heals undead targets.

entries.name: Elemental Cantrip
entries.cost: standard or bonus action by level; 0 mana
entries.targeting: single target until level 5; up to 3 targets at level 5
rules: Elemental only; necrotic is not allowed.
Damage is INT at levels 2 and 3.
Damage is INT + 1 at levels 4 and 5.
Level 4 cannot be cast if another magical or physical attack was made earlier in the same turn.

entries.name: Elemental Split
entries.targeting: multiple targets; target count by level 2, 3, 4, 5 from levels 2-5
rules: Base split damage is ceil((INT + Elementalist level) / 2).
Level 3+ may spend extra mana to increase split damage.
Level 5 necrotic bonus mana increases damage faster than elemental bonus mana.

entries.name: Heal Living
entries.targeting: touch at level 1; up to 4 targets in 25m at level 2+
rules: Healing equals INT + Healing level.
Removes bleeding.
Level 4 can regrow missing limbs.
Level 5 can overheal once per character per day up to target STAM.
Against undead, healing becomes radiant damage.

entries.name: Holy Purge
rules: Cures poison, disease, and curse.

entries.name: Healing Touch
rules: Heals half of Heal Living, rounded up.
Stops bleeding.
A target cannot receive this more than twice per day.
Against undead, healing becomes radiant damage.

entries.name: Lunar Bless
rules: Grants +1 mana bonus per level.
Grants Night Vision to self at level 1.
Each level after 1 extends Night Vision to one additional ally.

entries.name: Let There Be Light
entries.targeting: explicit selected aura beneficiaries; caster is always included as the source
rules: Creates a light aura source.
Selected beneficiaries receive source-linked shared aura effects.
Applies hit, damage reduction, and soak bonuses by level.
Range and duration increase by level.
Removing the source aura removes linked beneficiary effects.

entries.name: Lessen Darkness
entries.cost: requires active Let There Be Light source
entries.targeting: explicit selected linked aura targets from active light aura
entries.duration: while linked aura source remains active
rules: Selected targets lose one resistance level.
The source aura target list is updated so source removal clears the linked effects.

entries.name: Luminous Restoration
rules: Restores mana equal to APP, APP x2, APP x3 at levels 3, 4, 5.

entries.name: Necromancer's Deception
rules: Provides melee bonus and hostile-undead aggro manipulation by level.

entries.name: Non-Living Warriors
entries.cost: standard action; mana depends on selected summon subtype
rules: Summon options are Non-Living Skeleton at level 1+, Non-Living Zombie at level 2+, and Non-Living Skeleton King at level 4+.
Creates one selected summon using Necromancy level and APP-based scaling.
Replacing behavior is per summon subtype.

entries.name: Necrotic Touch
rules: Requires hit/miss touch attack resolution.
On hit, deals APP + Necromancy level damage at levels 3 and 4.
On hit, deals APP + 2 x Necromancy level damage at level 5.
Heals caster by Necromancy level even if damage dealt is zero.
Heals undead targets instead of damaging them.
No effect on shadow/incorporeal targets.

entries.name: Necromancer's Bless
rules: Resurrects a recently fallen living being to 1 HP and removes death-related statuses.

entries.name: Dismiss Summon
entries.availability: when caster has an active necromancy summon
rules: Dismisses the selected necromancy summon.

entries.name: Sleek Visage
rules: Cosmetic outfit and armor changes at level 3; minor body cosmetics at level 5.

entries.name: Smoldering Shadow
entries.cost: standard action; 2 mana self or 4 mana aura at level 4+
entries.targeting: self at lower levels; explicit selected aura beneficiaries when aura mode is selected at level 4+
rules: Grants stealth and AC bonuses by level.
Removing the source aura removes linked beneficiary effects.

entries.name: Shadow Walk
entries.targeting: one living target; range is 25m x Shadow Control level
rules: Movement-style shadow relocation; current mechanics log the action.

entries.name: Shadow Walk and Attack
entries.targeting: one living target; range is 25m x Shadow Control level
rules: Ambush-style shadow walk; target is surprised and loses AC for that attack.

entries.name: Shadow Manipulation
rules: Deals MAN + Shadow Control level shadow damage; attack is always successful without marginal hit bonus.

entries.name: Shadow Fighter
rules: Creates one shadow fighter summon using Shadow Control level and MAN-based scaling.

entries.name: Dismiss Summon
entries.availability: when caster has an active shadow summon
rules: Dismisses the selected shadow summon.
